channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

EXCLUSIVE: Sony Pictures Animation and Amazon MGM Studios are coming back together for the fifth ‘Hotel Transylvania’ movie, ‘The Haunting of Hotel Transylvania,’ set for theatrical release on Oct. 8, 2027. More details here: https://deadline.com/2026/07/ - facebook.com
